prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学偏热，山东大学在上述领域均有对应优势学科；本省2026年物理类考生约31.3 万人（按近年占比估算），较2025年减少约2.4%，竞争略有缓和；山东大学位于山东，非本省高校，无本地保护；2025年 在安徽招生占比约2.8%，属中等偏下水平，跨省报考受地域偏好影响有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 5452 → 4895 → 6213 → 7440 → 8106, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3211 places in the last 3 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 8106; from 2021 to 2025, the provincial Physics Category enrollment plans were 205 → 194 → 200 → 213 → 197, with 168 in Physics Category and 28 in Medical Category (both under Physics Group) in 2026, totaling 196, a slight decrease of 0.5% from 2025, essentially flat. 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking stable at 21–22 from 2021 to 2026, a top national comprehensive university.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, with ongoing public opinion impact from the study partner incident; Douyin popularity ranking 20th (high heat), short video exposure high, application attention not low; from 2022 to 2024, there were abnormal signals such as a gap in Shaanxi and a drop in admission lines in Sichuan, with a lagging effect on application psychology; Mathematics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, Clinical Medicine A-, and 19 other A- and above disciplines, strong disciplinary strength, with strong support in popular directions such as Mathematics, Clinical Medicine, and Computer Science.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and other majors continue to be highly recommended; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology are relatively hot; Shandong University has corresponding advantageous disciplines in the above fields; in 2026, the province's Physics Category candidates are about 313,000 (estimated based on recent proportions), a decrease of about 2.4% from 2025, slightly easing competition; Shandong University is located in Shandong, not a local university, with no local protection; in 2025, its enrollment share in Anhui was about 2.8%, at a medium-low level, with limited impact from cross-provincial application due to regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the essentially flat enrollment plan for 2026, a slight decrease in provincial Physics Category candidates, a somewhat negative reputation but high Douyin attention, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 8106; predicted minimum ranking about 8111, range 7611–8611.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<7611), focus on striving for top Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were 883 → 906 → 971 → 1143 → 1179, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 273 places in the last 3 years, and a baseline of about 1179 in 2025; from 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plans for History Category were 56 → 53 → 52 → 37 → 50, with a plan of 52 in 2026, an increase of 2 (4% expansion) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking stable at 21st–22nd from 2021 to 2026, a top national comprehensive university; 2026 reputation evaluation slightly negative, ongoing impact from the study partner incident; Douyin popularity ranking 20th (high heat), high short video exposure, considerable application attention; from 2022 to 2024, there were abnormal admission signals such as a gap in Shaanxi, with a lagging psychological impact on applications; Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Marxist Theory A, Law A-, Archaeology A-, etc., strong humanities and philosophy disciplines, highly attractive to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is divided and wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Literature recommended, Journalism and Communication clearly discouraged; Shandong University's advantageous disciplines such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature correspond to popular liberal arts majors; in 2026, the province's History Category candidates are about 138,000 (estimated based on recent proportion), a decrease of about 2.4% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition; Shandong University is located in Shandong, not a local university, no local protection; in 2025, its enrollment proportion in Anhui was about 2.8%, at a medium-low level, cross-provincial application affected by regional preferences to a limited extent.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, a slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, a slight decrease in the province's History Category candidates, a slightly negative reputation but high Douyin attention, etc., competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 1179; predicted minimum ranking about 1227, range 1104–1350.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<1104), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 山东大学医学类在安徽省2021年最低位次5452（计划33人），2022年4895（计划37人），2023年因护理学专业拉低整体位次至30345（计划33人），2024年回升至26380（计划36 人），2025年进一步回升至23250（计划28人）。2026年医学类招生计划28人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化。近年位次持续回升趋势明显，从2023年低谷30345连续两年上升至23 250，累计回升超过7000名，反映医学类报考热度恢复。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学是教育部直属全国重点综合性大学，国家'985工程''211工程'重点建设高校，入选'双一流'建设高校（A类）。学校医学学科历史悠久，齐鲁医学品牌在全国享有较高声 誉，综合实力稳居国内高校前列。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 山东大学医学类专业在安徽省持续保持较高报考热度，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争激烈，位次长期处于全省前列。2023年位次异常波动后，2024-2025年连续两年回升， 表明医学类整体热度正在稳步恢复。学校位于山东省济南市，作为省会城市区位优势明显，对安徽考生具有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次回升趋势及2026年招生计划持平因素，预测2026年山东大学医学类在安徽省最低录取位次约为22950名，较2025年小幅上升（更难进）。波动区间为22450至23450名 ，建议考生在此区间内合理布局志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Shandong University's medical category in Anhui Province had a minimum ranking of 5452 in 2021 (plan 33), 4895 in 2022 (plan 37), dropped to 30345 in 2023 due to the nursing major lowering the overall ranking (plan 33), recovered to 26380 in 2024 (plan 36), and further recovered to 23250 in 2025 (plan 28). In 2026, the medical category enrollment plan is 28, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction. In recent years, the ranking has shown a clear upward trend, rising from the 2023 low of 30345 for two consecutive years to 23250, a cumulative increase of over 7000 places, reflecting the recovery of medical category application popularity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a national key comprehensive university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and selected as a 'Double First-Class' construction university (Class A). The university's medical disciplines have a long history, and the Qilu Medicine brand enjoys a high reputation nationwide, with comprehensive strength firmly among the top domestic universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Shandong University's medical majors continue to maintain high application popularity in Anhui Province. Core majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology are highly competitive, with rankings consistently among the top in the province. After the abnormal ranking fluctuation in 2023, the rankings have rebounded for two consecutive years in 2024-2025, indicating that the overall popularity of the medical category is steadily recovering. The university is located in Jinan City, Shandong Province, which, as a provincial capital, has obvious locational advantages and attracts some Anhui candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the upward trend of historical rankings and the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Shandong University's medical category in Anhui Province in 2026 will be approximately 22950, a slight increase (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The fluctuation range is 22450 to 23450. It is recommended that candidates arrange their volunteer choices reasonably within this range.

- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program, Pediatrics Direction)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Stomatology (Qilu Medical Hall Innovation Experimental Class)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Stomatology (Five-Year Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety.
